title: Unauthorized error when making GET request
symptom: When attempting to make a GET request to the iRacing API, the response returns a 401 Unauthorized error, indicating that requests must be authorized.
applies_when: Making a GET request to iRacing API
not_this_if: Authentication is successful and valid cookies are set
root_cause: The 401 Unauthorized error occurs when the request does not include valid authentication credentials or cookies. In this case, the necessary cookie for authorization was not properly included in the request headers.
fix_steps: Open the HTTP Request node settings
Enable the 'Include Response Headers and Status' option
Parse the value of 'ssoCookieValue' from the 'set-cookie' header in the response
agent_instruction: Enable the necessary options in the HTTP Request node to include response headers and parse the cookie value.
